description:
## Component: hx-avatar (NEW)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 4/6 libraries**

User or entity representation showing image, initials, or fallback icon.

### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Property + Slot)
Properties control image source and initials. Slot accepts custom content (Drupal user picture field).

### API Design
**Properties:** `src` (image URL), `alt` (image alt text), `initials` (fallback text), `hx-size` (xs|sm|md|lg|xl), `shape` (circle|square)
**Slots:** Default (custom avatar content — overrides src/initials), `badge` (status indicator overlay)
**CSS Parts:** `avatar`, `image`, `initials`, `fallback-icon`, `badge`

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# From Drupal user entity #}
<hx-avatar
  src="{{ file_url(user.user_picture.entity.uri.value) }}"
  alt="{{ user.getDisplayName }}"
  initials="{{ user.getDisplayName|first }}"
  hx-size="md"
>
  <hx-badge slot="badge" variant="success" pill></hx-badge>
</hx-avatar>

{# Using Drupal's image field directly via slot #}
<hx-avatar hx-size="lg">
  {{ content.field_profile_photo }}
</hx-avatar>
```

The slot approach lets Drupal's Media system handle responsive images while the component provides the circular crop and layout.

### Healthcare: Patient avatars in lists, physician directory, care team display

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Image → initials → icon fallback chain
2. All sizes from xs to xl with design tokens
3. Badge slot for online/offline/status indicators
4. Slot accepts Drupal image field render arrays
5. Lazy loading for images
title: T1-21: hx-avatar — User/Entity Representation

## Component: hx-avatar (NEW)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 4/6 libraries**

User or entity representation showing image, initials, or fallback icon.

### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Property + Slot)

**Slots:** Default (custom avatar content — overrides src/initials), `badge` (status indicator overlay)
**CSS Parts:** `avatar`, `image`, `initials`, `fallback-icon`, `badge`
